blockingIssues.description: llama-server binary validation can be bypassed when llama profiles exist but llama_server path is omitted, violating VAL-CFG-014.
resolve_vllm_command_line() does not include vLLM docker image information required by VAL-CFG-010.
create_backend() still panics for BackendType::Vllm via unimplemented!(), conflicting with VAL-TRAIT-010 dispatch expectations.
backend_info_to_process_info() defaults missing PID to 0, creating unsafe process-group kill semantics during adopt/stop paths.
/api/status omits backend when stopped due to skip_serializing_if, but VAL-API-001 requires backend to be present as null.
status_from_state() collapses Starting/Stopping into transitioning, causing status-shape regression against prior behavior.
post_swap logs drain mode without setting a drain flag, so chat-drain 503 guard is not actively enforced during swap drain.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md to document that profiles with neither backend sub-table use legacy flat llama-server compatibility (both sub-tables remains invalid).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Deduplicate repeated skill-procedure observations across feature reviews before synthesis and treat them as one systemic finding.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four reviews reported the same rust-backend fail-first-TDD mismatch pattern; this surfaced as duplicate reviewer observations rather than a single synthesized systemic issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mission-authoring guidance that feature scope, expectedBehavior, and validation-contract assertions must align within the same milestone to avoid staging contradictions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: llama-server-backend-impl feature text says vLLM backend comes later, while VAL-TRAIT-010 currently expects VllmBackend dispatch in backend-abstraction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax strict fail-first-TDD wording for pure refactors where behavior-preservation assertions are primarily validated by existing tests and targeted regressions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple backend-abstraction workers implemented behavior-preserving refactors before introducing new tests; this repeated across reviews as a skill/process mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit requirement for daemon route/SSE contract tests when API response shape changes are in scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: daemon-trait-integration review found regressions in /api/status shape and swap-drain behavior; daemon crate currently has no in-crate tests for these contract assertions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated 'rust-backend fail-first TDD mismatch' entries from individual reviewers.
